note: Fedwire/CHIPS payment-file pre-migration sweep (FA-3). Vector 1: all-compliant inline records. Vector 2: CSV batch with mixed violations. Vector 3: empty-file finite edge case.

vectors.name: inline_records_all_compliant
vectors.description: Three fully-structured Fedwire/CHIPS records, all compliant -- zero risk.

output_payload.disambiguation: sweep_fedwire_addresses batch-sweeps a payment file (CSV or pre-parsed records) through the same rules as lint_fedwire_structured_address (art-349), per record, and rolls the results into a rejection-risk report. For a single-message lint use lint_fedwire_structured_address (art-349) directly.
output_payload.pii_note: All fields operate on STRUCTURAL address components only. No real party PII enters this kernel -- use synthetic or anonymised payment-file data.
output_payload.table_source: Federal Reserve Financial Services, Fedwire Funds Service ISO 20022 November 2026 Release FAQ (frbservices.org/resources/financial-services/wires/iso-20022-implementation-center/november-release-faq); The Clearing House CHIPS ISO 20022 address rules (aligned to Fedwire)
output_payload.regulatory_basis: Federal Reserve Financial Services Fedwire Funds Service ISO 20022 November 2026 Release; The Clearing House CHIPS ISO 20022 implementation (aligned to Fedwire address rules)

vectors.name: csv_mixed_risk
vectors.description: CSV payment file with one unstructured (banned) record, one silent-fail duplication, one compliant record.

policy_parameters.file_content:
network,street_name,building_number,post_code,town_name,country,country_subdivision,address_lines
fedwire,,,,,US,,123 Main Street Springfield
chips,Main Street,1,10005,Springfield,US,,Main Street
fedwire,Oak Ave,5,10006,Springfield,US,,

For a single-message lint use lint_fedwire_structured_address (art-349) directly.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: Federal Reserve Financial Services Fedwire Funds Service ISO 20022 November 2026 Release; The Clearing House CHIPS ISO 20022 implementation (aligned to Fedwire address rules)

vectors.name: empty_file_finite
vectors.description: Empty payment file -- zero records, zero risk, finite (no NaN/Infinity).
